overall.description: First-person helicopter cockpit view from a flight simulator, flying over a hazy coastal urban area during golden hour. The aircraft maneuvers over water and cityscape with reduced visibility due to atmospheric haze, showcasing the AS350 instrument panel and sweeping aerial views of the terrain below.

agents.ego_description: piloting helicopter straight over coastal urban area, maintaining steady altitude while cityscape passes below on the left

entered.detail: AS350 helicopter instrument panel with flight gauges, altimeter, and GPS navigation display
modern urban buildings and dense coastline visible through heavy atmospheric haze
calm coastal water body adjacent to the city, reflecting the hazy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a steady helicopter flight over a hazy coastal city during golden hour. The instrument panel dominates the foreground while the urban coastline stretches below through the mist, with open water visible to the right. The aircraft maintains a straight course as the cityscape gradually shifts from center to left in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water airspace with direct sun glare

events.description: helicopter turns toward the sun, creating intense golden glare and reducing visibility through the haze
flying over open water with coastline now distant and minimal land visible

agents.ego_description: banking helicopter right over open water, facing directly into the low sun while maintaining altitude

entered.detail: intense golden sun glare through haze creating a bright glow and reduced contrast

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks right over the open water, turning toward the setting or rising sun. Intense golden glare floods the cockpit view as the urban coastline disappears behind the aircraft. The water dominates the landscape below while the hazy atmosphere creates a diffused, warm light throughout the scene.

events.description: coastal cityscape comes back into view as helicopter completes turn back toward land

agents.ego_description: turning helicopter left to head back toward the coastal urban area, reducing the bank angle as the city returns to view

entered.detail: urban buildings and coastline returning to view through the persistent haze

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks left, turning away from the sun and back toward the coastal city. The intense glare diminishes as the urban landscape reappears ahead, with the water now visible to the left. The aircraft completes its maneuvering pattern over the hazy coastal environment as the cityscape once again dominates the forward view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight over a hazy coastal city that transitions from a steady urban approach into a blinding solar glare before returning to the cityscape. It begins with the helicopter flying straight over the mist-covered urban coastline, with the instrument panel in the foreground as the city gradually shifts toward the left of the frame. As the aircraft banks right over open water, the scene is suddenly flooded with intense golden glare from the sun, causing the coastline to disappear behind the aircraft. The camera then banks left to turn away from the sun, allowing the glare to diminish as the urban landscape reappears ahead. Finally, the aircraft completes its maneuver, shifting the water to the left as the hazy cityscape once again dominates the forward view.
